title: Rich Dense Korean Potatoes Patbingsu
description: A charred, dense, one-pot Korean dish featuring new potatoes and high-protein ingredients, served in a patbingsu form. This dish is a unique twist on traditional Korean cuisine.
instructions: In a large pot, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the diced potatoes and cook until they are golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the edamame, korean chili flakes, soy sauce, and brown sugar, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
Stir in the shredded mozzarella cheese until melted and well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and top with chopped green onions.
Serve hot, garnished with additional green onions and korean chili flakes if desired.
